query:
SELECT ml.id, ml.name, ml.selectionType, COUNT(m.id) as modifierCount FROM modifierLists ml LEFT JOIN modifiers m ON m.modifierListId = ml.id GROUP BY ml.id;
SELECT mi.name, mi.category, GROUP_CONCAT(ml.name ORDER BY ml.name SEPARATOR ', ') as modifiers FROM menuItems mi LEFT JOIN menuItemModifierLists miml ON miml.menuItemId = mi.id LEFT JOIN modifierLists ml ON ml.id = miml.modifierListId GROUP BY mi.id ORDER BY mi.category, mi.name;
